title: Plugin Config
description: Validates the structure of a plugin config.yaml file

uuid.description: Stable unique identifier for this plugin (lowercase UUID v4)

image.description: Relative path to the plugin icon image file

model_schema.description: Relative path to the model-level JSON Schema file

default_canvas_type.description: Mermaid diagram keyword used when seeding a new canvas file (e.g. erDiagram)

base_objects.description: Object types provided by this plugin

name.description: Display name of the object type

definition.description: Relative path to the JSON Schema file for this object type

template.description: Relative path to the default-value seed file for new objects (may be empty when objects need no seed data)

archetype.description: Whether this object is a canvas node (entity) or edge (relation)

sufix.description: File suffix used when creating objects of this type (no dot, e.g. 'tbl')

icon.description: Relative path to the object-type icon (SVG or PNG)

products.description: Generated text artifacts for this object type

name.description: Display name of the product (e.g. DDL, Canvas)

definition.description: Relative path to the Nunjucks template file

language.description: Monaco editor language ID for syntax highlighting (e.g. sql, mermaid)

basic.description: When true, this product is used for canvas drag-to-insert
